Human to Agent final verification report
Observed on: 2026-07-13 (Asia/Shanghai)

Commands actually run against the final candidate:
- uv run ruff format --check .: PASS, 86 files already formatted.
- uv run ruff check .: PASS, all checks passed.
- uv run mypy src tests: PASS, no issues in 84 source files.
- uv run python -m human_to_agent.services.schema_catalog --check schemas/v1: PASS.
- uv run pytest -q: PASS, 304 passed and 3 skipped in 49.76s.
- git diff --check: PASS, no whitespace errors reported.
- hta validate, stage assess, and events verify for human-to-agent-pilot: PASS.
- release build for human-to-agent-pilot: PASS.

The skipped tests are not represented as executed. This report does not claim a new
independent-agent approval after the user stopped additional sub-agent verification.
